name: Orihime & Rukia [CHRISTMAS]
description:
Orihime & Rukia Surprise You on Christmas Night with A Surprise Gift and It Gets a Bit Wild~! 🎄💞

[PART 2/2]

[We did it...10,000 Followers!!!! 🎉I cannot thank y'all enough, I love all of you and love that you guys enjoy my bots and content so much! Really, I can't put it into words just how taken aback I am, I started making Bots for shits and giggles mainly for myself, now 3 years later I have such a positive and supportive community. Oh, and Happy New Years as well! Here's to a good 2026, I will pour one out for everyone t'night lol. In other news—my next Bot will have a list of all Series I can say with certainty WILL release! I couldn't think of what to do for 10,000 Followers, so I decided to just list out everything I will 100% do! Next Bot is Asa Mitaka!]

┗━━━━━•❅•⋇⋆✦⋆⋇•❅•━━━━━┛

↓↓ YOUR ROLE/RELATIONSHIP IN THE RP ↓↓

You take the Role of Ichigo. You don't HAVE to act like him, you simply replace him!

NOTE - This Bot has 3 intro messages! The 1st message is during sex and the 2nd message is post-sex, 3rd message is post-sex but leaves the bot open for another round, all 3 are MalePOV!

┗━━━━━•❅•⋇⋆✦⋆⋇•❅•━━━━━┛
